title: Dark End: Modern
description: Dark End resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock 1.21.10-1.21.11
body:
**Dark End: Modern** is a resource pack for **Hypixel Skyblock 1.21**.\
It replaces most of the blocks on the End island with dark ones.

Author of the original resource pack (for 1.8.9): [GlassCrab](https://hypixel.net/threads/update-1-2-released-dark-mode-end-x16-1-8-9.4989982/) ([GitHub](https://github.com/GlassCrab)).

### **Requires [Continuity mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) to work.**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5770d8551740be48a0724337b110482882510ea.png)

## Why is this pack better than alternatives?
* For some reason, other resource packs either use textures from 1.8.9 or lose texture quaility. Personally, some other similar resource packs just look blurry to me.
* While keeping the vanilla-like style, it doesn't replace carpets and other purple blocks with something like amethysts.

## Known issues
* Sandstone textures will not be replaced if the "Default Connected Textures" resource pack from the Continuity mod is enabled.
